name: SSL Store AnyCA REST plugin
description: AnyCA Gateway REST plugin that extends SSL Store Certificate Authority Service to Keyfactor Command. SSL Store is a certificate reseller providing access to 80+ certificate products from vendors including DigiCert, Sectigo, RapidSSL, GeoTrust, and Comodo through a single API.

ca_plugin_config.name: SSLStoreURL
ca_plugin_config.description: The Base URL for the SSL Store API endpoint (e.g. https://sandbox-wbapi.thesslstore.com).

ca_plugin_config.name: PartnerCode
ca_plugin_config.description: The Partner Code obtained from SSL Store.

ca_plugin_config.name: AuthToken
ca_plugin_config.description: The Authentication Token obtained from SSL Store.

ca_plugin_config.name: PageSize
ca_plugin_config.description: The number of records to return per page during synchronization (default: 100).

ca_plugin_config.name: Enabled
ca_plugin_config.description: Flag to Enable or Disable the CA connector.

ca_plugin_config.name: RenewalWindow
ca_plugin_config.description: Number of days before order expiry to trigger a renewal instead of a reissue (default: 30).

enrollment_config.name: Approver Email
enrollment_config.description: Comma-separated approver email address(es) for domain validation.

enrollment_config.name: Validity Period (In Days)
enrollment_config.description: Certificate validity period in days (e.g. 90, 365, 730). Automatically converted to months for the SSL Store API.

enrollment_config.name: Organization Name
enrollment_config.description: Organization name for the certificate (required for OV/EV products).

enrollment_config.name: Organization ID
enrollment_config.description: DigiCert organization ID for Enterprise Organization (-EO) products.
